# Sometimes things are slow

## What's wrong

The app feels slow sometimes. Pages take forever to load.

## When does it happen

Mostly in the afternoon? Not sure. It comes and goes.

## What I tried

I refreshed the page and it was fine. Then later it was slow again.

## Environment

I'm on Chrome.
